description: 6 LinkedIn Safari scale and reliability fixes (post LI-001 through LI-007)

features.name: Multi-tab SafariDriver pool + Playwright integration for parallel scraping
MutationObserver DOM change detection replacing fixed sleep polls
Background reply watcher with Supabase webhook and /api/linkedin/replies endpoints
Hybrid clipboard + character-by-character keystroke fallback for typeViaClipboard
Session health heartbeat monitor with isLoggedIn() + /api/linkedin/health/session endpoint
